UpdateAppBlbUdpListener.blbId: The identifier of the associated LoadBalancer
UpdateAppBlbUdpListener.clientToken: Idempotency token, no more than 64 characters
UpdateAppBlbUdpListener.listenerPort: The port number of the listener
UpdateAppBlbUdpListener.scheduler: Load balancing algorithm, supports 3 options: "RoundRobin" / "LeastConnection" / "Hash". "RoundRobin" means weighted round robin, "LeastConnection" means least connections, "Hash" means hashing by source IP
UpdateAppBlbUdpListener.udpSessionTimeout: UDP session timeout in seconds. Default is 90, must be an integer between 5 and 4000
UpdateAppBlbUdpListener.description: Description text, no more than 200 characters
